mapper.sql: id, name, sort_order, status, create_time, update_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM service_category WHERE status = 1 ORDER BY sort_order ASC, id ASC

SELECT c.*, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM service_item WHERE category_id = c.id) as service_count FROM service_category c
AND c.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
ORDER BY c.sort_order ASC, c.id ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM service_item WHERE category_id = #{categoryId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO service_category (name, sort_order, status) VALUES (#{name}, #{sortOrder}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE service_category SET sort_order = #{sortOrder} WHERE id = #{id}
